welcome.farmer.Abigail: Hey @, welcome to Pelican Town!^  I left you some Amethyst outside your door - it's said to bring good luck, maybe it'll help you in the mines!^^^      - Abigail
welcome.farmer.Alex: Yo @, welcome to the neighborhood!^  I left some Eggs outside your door - hope you like 'em scrambled or sunny-side up!^^^      - Alex
welcome.farmer.Elliott: To @, a warm welcome to Pelican Town.^  I've left a Tom Kha Soup by your door - it's important to keep healthy!^^^      - Elliott
welcome.farmer.Emily: Dearest @, welcome to our little town!^  I left some Wool for you - maybe you can make something beautiful with it!^^^      - Emily
welcome.farmer.Haley: Hi @, welcome to Pelican Town!^  I left some Sunflowers by your door - they're cheerful, just like you should be here!^^^      - Haley
welcome.farmer.Harvey: Hello @, welcome to Pelican Town.^  I've left some Coffee for you - hope it helps you settle in and feel energized!^^^      - Harvey
welcome.farmer.Leah: Welcome to the valley, @!^  I left a fresh Salad outside your door - enjoy the taste of nature's bounty!^^^      - Leah
welcome.farmer.Maru: Greetings @, and welcome to Pelican Town!^  I left a Battery Pack for you - might come in handy for your farm gadgets!^^^      - Maru
welcome.farmer.Penny: Hello @, welcome to our quiet town.^  I left a Poppy by your door - a little bit of beauty to brighten your day.^^^      - Penny
welcome.farmer.Sam: Hey @, welcome to town!^  I left some Joja Cola outside - it's not the best for you, but hey, welcome gifts are welcome gifts, right?^^^      - Sam
welcome.farmer.Sebastian: Welcome, @.^  I left a Frozen Tear outside your door - you can find more on the mines near my house.^^^      - Sebastian
welcome.farmer.Shane: @, welcome... I guess.^  Left you some Beer outside - don't go wild, alright?^^^      - Shane
welcome.farmer.Caroline: Dear @, welcome to Pelican Town!^  I left some Parsnip Seeds by your door - a little something to get your garden started.^^^      - Caroline
welcome.farmer.Clint: Howdy @, welcome to town.^  I left some Copper Ore outside - might be useful if you're into crafting, eh?^^^      - Clint
welcome.farmer.Demetrius: Greetings @, and welcome to the community.^  I left some Bean Starter by your door - happy gardening!^^^      - Demetrius
welcome.farmer.Dwarf: ..... *[Welcome, @.^  I've left you some Ruby outside your door. May its shine and beauty inspire you!]* ..... -^^^      Dwarf
welcome.farmer.Evelyn: Dear @,^  welcome to Pelican Town! I left some Cookies outside your door - a little treat to welcome you.^^^      - Evelyn
welcome.farmer.George: Welcome, @.^  I left a Leek outside your door - it's good for you, whether you like it or not.^^^      - George
welcome.farmer.Gus: Welcome to the Stardrop Saloon, @!^  I left a Spaghetti outside your door - enjoy!^^^      - Gus
welcome.farmer.Jas: Hi @, welcome to Pelican Town!^  I left a Pink Cake outside your door - it's my favorite, hope you like it too!^^^      - Jas
welcome.farmer.Jodi: Welcome to Pelican Town, @!^  I left some Pancakes outside your door - a little something to help you settle in.^^^      - Jodi
welcome.farmer.Kent: Welcome to our town, @.^  I left some Rhubarb outside your door - it's pretty versatile in the kitchen, you'll find.^^^      - Kent
welcome.farmer.Krobus: Greetings, @, and welcome to Pelican Town.^  I left a Void Egg outside your door - it's... something special. Use it wisely.^^^      - Krobus
welcome.farmer.Lewis: Welcome to Pelican Town, @!^  I left a Parsnip outside your door - a humble but essential part of any farm.^^^      - Lewis
welcome.farmer.Linus: Welcome, @.^  I left some Wild Horseradish outside your door - adds a nice kick to any dish, if you like spice.^^^      - Linus
welcome.farmer.Marnie: Howdy @, welcome to the valley!^  I left some Hay outside your door - for your animals, whenever you get some.^^^      - Marnie
welcome.farmer.Pam: Hey @, welcome to town!^  I left you some Beer outside - come join me for a drink at the Saloon sometime!^^^      - Pam
welcome.farmer.Pierre: Welcome to my shop, @!^  I left some Potato Seeds outside your door - get your farm going!^^^      - Pierre
welcome.farmer.Robin: Hey @, welcome to Pelican Town!^  I left you 50 Wood outside your door - perfect for crafting a chest or whatever you need.^^^      - Robin
welcome.farmer.Sandy: Welcome to the Oasis, @!^  I left some Cactus Fruit outside your door - a little refreshment from the desert heat.^^^      - Sandy
welcome.farmer.Vincent: Hi @, welcome!^  I left a Grape outside your door - it's yummy!^^^      - Vincent
welcome.farmer.Willy: Ahoy there, @!^  Welcome to Pelican Town. I left some Bait outside your door - get fishing!^^^      - Willy
welcome.farmer.Andy: Hey @,^  Heard you're fixin' up the old farm. Busy with foragin' myself, but I'll swing by soon.^^^      - Andy
welcome.farmer.Gunther: Welcome @,^  I've been hearing a lot about you from the kids in Penny's class. I must say, I'm intrigued. Living in Pelican Town for so long, I've lost touch with the world. I've sent you a Geode - if you're lucky, Clint might find something interesting inside.^^^      - Gunther
welcome.farmer.Morris: Hello @,^  Lewis told me about the new face in town!^^Welcome to the JoJa Corp family!^^You should totally buy seeds from us - they're way cheaper than Pierre's. And, as a little welcome gift, I've sent you some free JoJa Cola samples.^^^      - Morris
welcome.farmer.Olivia: Hello dear,^  Caroline, Jodi, and I have been talking about you nonstop! We're all so excited to see the old farm come back to life.^^I've sent you a chocolate cake - you must be starving from all the hard work! I just love cooking, and I hope you enjoy it.^^^      - Olivia
welcome.farmer.Victor: Hi @,^  I, uh, I can kind of relate to leaving the big town behind. I sent you some hardwood - it's great for building bridges. I hope you find it useful.^^^      - Victor
welcome.farmer.Sophia: Welcome @,^   It's so nice to have another farmer friend in the community! I've sent you a Fairy Flower, but please don't try to plant it in the wrong season - all seeds have their own special time. I'm still getting used to things around here myself...^^^      - Sophia
welcome.farmer.Ysabelle: Welcome to Ridgeside, @.^  I've left a Golden Rose Fin at your door - a small token of grace to begin your new chapter here. May your days unfold as gently as a dance.^^^      - Ysabelle
welcome.farmer.Flor: H-hello, @... welcome.^  I-I left you a Sweet Cranberry Cheesecake - I hope it's alright. If you ever need someone to talk to, I'm... I'm here for that, truly.^^^      - Flor
welcome.farmer.Philip: Hey @, welcome aboard!^  I left you a Jumpy Coffee Cake - fun fact: caffeine was basically a superpower before superheroes even existed. Isn't that cool?^^^      - Philip
welcome.farmer.Ian: Hi @, welcome to town.^  I made you some Fried Fish a la Ridge - it's nothing fancy, but I hope it hits the spot. If you ever need a hand with repairs, just ask.^^^      - Ian
welcome.farmer.Sean: Hey @, welcome! Hope you're ready to have a reel-y good time.^  I left you a Highland Butterwort - no big DEAL, but I'm sure it'll grow on you!^^^      - Sean
welcome.farmer.Kenneth: @. Welcome, I suppose.^  I left a Mountain Hokkaido outside - figured you could use it more than my workbench could. Don't expect me at parties, but knock if something needs wiring.^^^      - Kenneth
welcome.farmer.Maddie: @. So you're the new farmer.^  Here's a Pink Frosted Sprinkled Doughnut. Don't read into it - it was just extra. ...The sprinkles are the good part, don't waste them.^^^      - Maddie
welcome.farmer.Corine: Hi @, welcome, welcome!^  I brought you some Wild Apple Juice - I just KNEW you'd love it! If there's anything at all you need, please let me help, okay?^^^      - Corine
welcome.farmer.Kiarra: Ciao @, welcome to the neighborhood!^  Left you a Summer Mountain Blessing - a dope little piece of nature that Joja could never mass-produce. Stay true out there, alright?^^^      - Kiarra
welcome.farmer.Jeric: Daaang @, the new farmer's already looking good!^  I left you a Winter Night Feast - only the finest for someone with your... potential. Come by the shop sometime, yeah?^^^      - Jeric
welcome.farmer.Shiro: @. Welcome.^  I left you a Summit Snowbell. It endures the cold of the peaks - a reminder that quiet strength carries us through hard seasons. I wish you well here.^^^      - Shiro
welcome.farmer.Blair: ¡Hola @! Welcome, welcome!^  I caught you a Fluffy Apple Crumble - okay, okay, I didn't catch it, but I DID save it just for you! We're gonna be great amigos, sí?^^^      - Blair
welcome.farmer.Alissa: Hello @, welcome.^  I left an Aurorean Iris from the orchard for you. It's... a small thing, but I hoped it might brighten your first days. Um, I'm really glad you're here.^^^      - Alissa
welcome.farmer.June: @... how curious, a new face in this quiet valley.^  I left you an Autumnal Serenity - like a melody that lingers after the last note fades. Perhaps we'll share a winter's evening sometime.^^^      - June
welcome.farmer.Aguar: @. I'll be brief.^  Here is a Golden Skull Coral. It is rare, so do not squander it on sentiment. Now, I have research to attend to - do try not to drown in the river.^^^      - Mr. Aguar
welcome.farmer.Bert: Well howdy, @!^  Thunderin' tarantulas, a fellow farmer at last! I left you a Crunchy Bagel to fuel those first mornings - work hard and enjoy the little things, y'hear?^^^      - Bert
welcome.farmer.Ezekiel: @. Heard we've got a new farmer. About time.^  Left you a Ridgeside Monkshood outside. My wife used to keep 'em around the house... anyway. Don't make me regret the kindness.^^^      - Ezekiel
welcome.farmer.Freddie: Ah, @! Welcome, welcome, my friend.^  I've set aside a Winter Night Feast for you - reminds me of a banquet I once had after slaying a frost serpent up north. Sit with me sometime and I'll tell you the whole tale.^^^      - Freddie
welcome.farmer.Keahi: Hi @!!! You're the new farmer, right?!^  I made you Highland Ice Cream all by myself - well, mostly! It's SO good, you gotta try it before it melts!!!^^^      - Keahi
welcome.farmer.Lenny: Well well, @, look who finally showed up.^  I left you a Highland Revani to sweeten the welcome - pairs perfectly with coffee and gossip, both of which I have in abundance. Drop by anytime.^^^      - Lenny
welcome.farmer.Lola: Welcome, dear @.^  I left you a Lava Lily - found it blooming near a volcano's edge, back in my adventuring days. Stop by sometime; I do love a good monster-slaying tale.^^^      - Lola
welcome.farmer.Olga: @. Welcome to the neighborhood.^  I baked you a Strawberry Lover Pie - eat well, farming's hard work and you'll need your strength. And mind your coin; this valley isn't cheap.^^^      - Olga
welcome.farmer.Pika: Aloha @, welcome to our little valley!^  I brought you a Lava Lily - a piece of warmth from my home islands. You're part of the ohana now, so come by the restaurant anytime. Mahalo for joining us!^^^      - Pika
welcome.farmer.Richard: Dear @, it is a pleasure to welcome you.^  I have left a Honey Ginger Whitefish for you - a proper meal to begin a new life deserves nothing less. Should you ever need lodging or counsel, my door is open.^^^      - Richard
welcome.farmer.Yuuma: Hello @. I hope I'm not intruding.^  I left a Cherry Berry Shakey for you - I wasn't sure what you'd like, so I'm sorry if it's not to your taste. Welcome to Ridgeside.^^^      - Yuuma
welcome.farmer.Trinnie: Hiii @!!!^  I left you a Pink Frosted Sprinkled Doughnut - it's so pink and pretty, just like my favorite flower Rosie! Ooh, we're gonna be the best of friends, I just know it!^^^      - Trinnie
welcome.farmer.Ariah: Greetings, @. Welcome to Ridgeside.^  I have provided you a Mountain Chico - a proper gift, as etiquette requires of a first introduction. ...I do hope we might become acquaintances. Regards.^^^      - Ariah
welcome.farmer.Maive: @. I trust you intend to make something of that farm.^  I have had a Matcha Latte sent to you - a small investment in a potentially useful acquaintance. Do not disappoint; I have little patience for wasted potential.^^^      - Maive
welcome.farmer.Louie: @. I suppose someone has to welcome the new peasant.^  Here, a Hundred Flavor Doughnut - it's expensive, so you should feel honored. ...You can visit sometime, if you want. Not that I care.^^^      - Louie
welcome.farmer.Irene: Kumusta, @! Welcome, langga!^  I cooked you a Strawberry Lover Pie with all my heart - a good meal is the warmest welcome I know. Eat up, and come find me whenever you're hungry!^^^      - Irene
welcome.farmer.Sonny: Welcome, @. May the mountain's grace watch over your path.^  I have left you a Relic Fox Mask - such old things carry the quiet blessing of those who came before. Walk well, and may your harvests be bountiful.^^^      - Sonny
welcome.farmer.Paula: Hey there, darling @!^  I left you a Ridgeside Shaketini - figured you could use a little something to unwind after all that moving in. Holler if you ever get banged up; patching folks up is kind of my thing, peach.^^^      - Paula
welcome.farmer.Carmen: ¡Hola @, welcome to Ridgeside!^  I saved you my freshest Zesty Tuna - caught it myself, unlike my ex who couldn't catch a cold, ha! Gracias for brightening up the place.^^^      - Carmen
welcome.farmer.Lorenzo: Ciao @, welcome, welcome!^  I set aside an Arugula Roll for you - please, eat, you look like you've been working too hard already. If you need anything from the store, just ask, sì?^^^      - Lorenzo
welcome.farmer.Shanice: Hello @, and welcome to our little community.^  I left you a Ridgeside Clementine - a sweet start for a fresh beginning. Do come by the store; I'd love to hear all about you.^^^      - Shanice
welcome.farmer.Anton: Hey @, welcome I guess.^  I left you a Ridge Azorean Flower - found it on a walk, thought it looked nicer than anything I've designed lately, ha. Anyway... glad you're here. Allora, make yourself at home.^^^      - Anton
welcome.farmer.Faye: Hi @, welcome, welcome!^  I left you a Forest Amancay - the color palette on this beauty is just to DIE for, so inspiring! Ooh, I can already tell you've got great taste for moving here.^^^      - Faye
welcome.farmer.Malaya: Hello, @, and welcome.^  I left you a Shell Bracelet - I picked up the habit of collecting little trinkets on my travels. It's nothing much, but I hope it brings you a smile. Take care, dear.^^^      - Malaya
welcome.farmer.Kimpoi: @. Welcome.^  I left you a Honey Glazed Salad. A new place takes root slowly - be patient with yourself, as I've learned to be. My shop is there whenever you need saplings.^^^      - Kimpoi
welcome.farmer.Naomi: Dear @, welcome to Ridgeside.^  I've left you a Kek's Style Shortcake - being away too long taught me not to let little kindnesses pass by. I hope this valley feels like home sooner than mine did.^^^      - Naomi
welcome.farmer.Jio: The spirits greet you, @, stranger no longer.^  I leave you a Kedi Delight - accept it as a sign that you are watched over, though unseen. Tread carefully; not all in these mountains is as it appears.^^^      - Jio
welcome.farmer.Daia: Hey there, cutie @!^  I left you a Summit Iced Tea - perfect for cooling off after a long day, trust me, baby. Oh, and if you ever dig up a cool rock out there, bring it to me, yeah?^^^      - Daia
welcome.farmer.Undreya: Yo @! Bet you didn't even see me drop this off, hehe.^  I left you an Elven Comb - don't ask where I got it, okay? Wanna play hide-and-seek sometime? You'll never find me!^^^      - Undreya
welcome.farmer.Zayne: Dear @, please allow me to welcome you properly.^  I have left you a Ginger Rangpur Meringue - a modest refinement to mark a new beginning. Amid all the obligations of this valley, I hope you find room to breathe. My sincerest regards.^^^      - Zayne
welcome.farmer.Bryle: @. Welcome. I'll keep this short.^  Left you a Summer Mountain Blessing at the door - checked the perimeter first, of course. This valley's mostly quiet, but stay vigilant all the same.^^^      - Bryle
welcome.farmer.Aideen: Good day, @, and welcome to our little town.^  I have taken the liberty of sending along some Jazz Seeds - a splash of colour does wonders for the soul, wouldn't you agree?^^^      - Aideen
welcome.farmer.ToriLK: Oh, um, hi @! I hope it's okay that I wrote... it is okay, right?^  I made you some Frostberry Bliss Balls - they're not much, but, um, I hope you like them!^^^      - Tori
welcome.farmer.CorwinLK: Ahoy, @, and welcome aboard - well, to town, anyway.^  Left you a Pale Ale to wet your whistle. Don't ask where it came from.^^^      - Corwin
welcome.farmer.DaleWaede: Welcome, @. It's good to have you here.^  I left some Ginger for you - warms you right up.^^^      - Dale
welcome.farmer.Beatrice: Welcome, mon cher @, to our humble town by the sea.^  I left you some Biteback Curry - a little warmth for the journey ahead. Merci beaucoup for choosing to stay.^^^      - Beatrice
welcome.farmer.Eyvinder: @. You're here now. Fine.^  Left you some Aged Void Goat Cheese. Made it myself. Eat it or don't.^^^      - Eyvinder
welcome.farmer.EdithHart: Welcome to town, @! Glad to have new blood around here.^  I sent over some Coffee to get you started - you'll need it out on that farm, trust me.^^^      - Edith
welcome.farmer.EthanHart: Oh, hey. You're the new farmer or whatever.^  Mom made me send you some Maple Syrup. It's actually pretty good, so... whatever, enjoy.^^^      - Ethan
welcome.farmer.Jacob: Hello, @. Welcome to the area.^  I left a Survival Burger for you - something filling for a long day's work.^^^      - Jacob
welcome.farmer.Eloise: Hi @! Do you like birds? I really, really do!^  I found you a Blue Jay Feather - isn't it the prettiest? You can keep it!^^^      - Eloise
welcome.farmer.Jasper: Greetings, @. It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance.^  I have left you a Diamond - a marvel of nature's craftsmanship. This shall be an excellent start to our friendship.^^^      - Jasper
welcome.farmer.Jessie: Welcome, @! It's always a joy to see someone new putting down roots.^  I left you some Cuccaroot Seeds - plant them with care and they'll reward you. Let me know if you ever need a hand.^^^      - Jessie
welcome.farmer.JosephineK: Welcome, @. We are delighted to have you join our community.^  I have sent you a bottle of Wine to mark the occasion - do savour it. May you feel at home here.^^^      - Josephine
welcome.farmer.Juliet: Well, well, fresh meat in town. Welcome, @.^  Tossed some Poppy Seeds your way - plant 'em, don't plant 'em, I'm not your mom.^^^      - Juliet
welcome.farmer.KeanuAvis: Yo @, welcome to the neighborhood, dude!^  Left you a Dish O' The Sea - farming sounds like a mad amount of work, so you'll need the energy. Catch you around!^^^      - Keanu
welcome.farmer.MichaelHart: Hello @, and welcome. It's nice to have you here.^  I left you a piece of Sea Glass I found on the shore - I thought you might like it.^^^      - Michael
welcome.farmer.OliverK: Hey, @. Guess we're neighbors now or something.^  Here's a Trilobite my mom made me dig out to give you. It's a fossil. Kinda cool, I guess.^^^      - Oliver
welcome.farmer.Rosa: Hi @, welcome to town! Hope you're settling in alright.^  I left you some Strawberry Seeds - nothing beats fresh berries, trust me. Swing by my coffee cart sometime!^^^      - Rosa
welcome.farmer.VivienneLK: Welcome, @. A new chapter begins for you, it seems.^  I've left you a Vintage Ruby Ring - every good story deserves a touch of the timeless. May yours be worth writing.^^^      - Vivienne
